message:
feat(storage): tick 145 reservation cluster cx-first siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Twenty-fourth sibling-expansion tick. Adds 3 new storage `_with_cx`
siblings for the pane-reservation cluster.

New siblings:
- create_reservation_with_cx (write path)
- release_reservation_with_cx (write path)
- expire_stale_reservations_with_cx (write path)

Each sibling does a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` for cancellation
budget honouring, then delegates to the unchanged legacy impl.

Test: `storage_tick145_reservation_cluster_roundtrip` seeds a pane
for FK, creates a 60s reservation (well above the 1s TTL floor),
confirms expire_stale returns 0 on a fresh reservation, then proves
release-twice semantics (first returns true, second returns false).
Verified via fork bypass: 492/492 storage:: tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage: 112 + 3 = 115 siblings across 140 legacy
pub async fns. 25 legacy methods still lack a sibling; reservation
cluster now fully covered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
